subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1913-05-04
subcodes.first_line: We have returned to Paris to see what the believers have done… We have come to Paris and are sowing the seeds. Can you arise and irrigate them? When the divine farmer ploughs the ground and scatters the seeds
subcodes.first_line_orig: باز ما مراجعت بپاریس نمودیم به‌بینیم احباب چه کرده‌اند... تخمی افشاندیم و برگشتیم حال شما میتوانید بروید آبیاری کنید؟
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @Christ; Christianity
